name: Dotted Glow Background
summary: A reusable Dotted Glow Background background effect that adds depth, focus, and atmosphere to modern UI sections.
detailedDescription: Dotted Glow Background is a reusable background effect designed to help teams compose polished UI sections faster without rebuilding common interaction patterns from scratch. It works by combining Tailwind-driven styling with composable React structure, and in many setups it can be paired with utility props and class overrides for project-specific branding. It is best suited for backgrounds, layout contexts where clear visual hierarchy matters. Visually, it feels balanced and can act as either a supporting accent or a focal element depending on spacing, color contrast, and surrounding content density. It typically relies on motion-driven transitions and timing curves to feel alive and premium. It combines well with complementary navigation, hero, card, and typography primitives, but should be used carefully to avoid animation overload, accessibility conflicts, or unnecessary performance cost on low-powered devices.
purpose: Create visual atmosphere around hero and CTA content
Guide user attention without changing structural layout
Improve perceived polish for premium landing pages
behavior: Provides composable UI behavior with optional animation and styling controls
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
